name: Bushwood Indoor Golf
about: Bushwood Indoor Golf is an indoor golf simulator venue that offers a modern golfing experience. The facility provides multiple bays equipped with advanced simulator technology for golfers to enjoy virtual rounds and practice sessions. The venue is designed to cater to both casual players and serious golfers looking to improve their game in a relaxed setting. The atmosphere combines a sports bar environment with premium golf simulation capabilities, making it suitable for various occasions from individual practice to group outings and social events.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium simulator technology for realistic golf experience
On-site food and drinks for a complete outing
Multiple bays available for groups and private events
Supportive environment for both practice and social play

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available serving food and snacks
Full bar with cocktails and beverages

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or rent them at the venue. Club rentals are available for those who don't have their own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed as the venue has a full kitchen and bar available for guests to purchase food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically take 1-2 hours depending on the simulator software and number of players in your group.

faq.question: Is this place kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Bushwood Indoor Golf is kid-friendly and welcomes families. Children can enjoy the golf experience in a safe and fun environment.
